purpose: Completion contract for the runtime membrane overhead evidence lane. It binds the fail-closed budget checker, TSM contention lane, and reviewer report into one replayable closeout without treating schema-golden or smoke-only evidence as public performance proof.

child_artifacts.title: Fail closed on TSM overhead budget regressions
Add massive-thread TSM contention E2E lane
Publish TSM overhead evidence report and reviewer checklist

claim_blockers_expected_without_live_per: overhead evidence is schema-golden or not current-source live proof
permissioned large-host contention evidence is absent
required_remote_validation_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/bd-owqho-test rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test runtime_membrane_overhead_evidence_lane_completion_contract_test -- --nocapture
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/bd-owqho-check rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness --test runtime_membrane_overhead_evidence_lane_completion_contract_test
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/bd-owqho-clippy rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --test runtime_membrane_overhead_evidence_lane_completion_contract_test -- -D warnings
validation_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/bd-owqho-test rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test runtime_membrane_overhead_evidence_lane_completion_contract_test -- --nocapture
